name: Garlicky Snowpeas Saute
recipeIngredient: 1 large sweet pepper, diced or chopped
1/2 cup jicama or water chestnuts, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok or deep skillet, heat oil.
2. Add garlic, scallions, and sweet pepper; sauté until softened and fragrant, about one minute.
3. Add snowpeas and jicama; sauté until cooked but still very tender-crisp, 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Add soy sauce and toss together.
5. Taste for seasoning; add more soy sauce if desired.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
